top_signals.title: Shipping Technology Launches ST Brain Lite Digitization for Chartered Inland Vessels
top_signals.summary: Shipping Technology, the Rotterdam-based inland shipping technology company, is launching ST Brain Lite, a compact, easy-to-install onboard intelligence unit that brings real-time data connectivity to chartered vessels. Inland shipping container…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Ares Owed $547 Million After Collapse of Textor’s Eagle Football
top_signals.summary: Ares Management Corp. was owed more than $547 million following the collapse of John Textor’s Eagle Football Group, according to a filing by the administrators on Wednesday.

top_signals.title: MARTAC Expands Across Western USA With Opening of San Diego Innovation Center
top_signals.summary: Maritime Tactical Systems, Inc. (MARTAC), a provider of fully autonomous unmanned surface vessels (USVs), announced the opening of the MARTAC Innovation Center West in San Diego, California. The new facility marks a milestone in the company’s expansion…
